title: cystopteris tenuis
intro: Cystopteris tenuis, also known as the slender brittle fern or narrow cleft lip fern, is a species of fern found in North America and Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits associated with Cystopteris tenuis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Cystopteris tenuis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and overall well-being.
